description: Perform an Inverse Distance Weighting (IDW) interpolation on earthquake magnitude data from /home/ga/GIS_Data/california_earthquakes.geojson using the 'mag' attribute to create a continuous raster surface. Ensure the output raster has a pixel size of approximately 0.05 degrees (or at least 100x100 pixels). Export the resulting GeoTIFF to /home/ga/GIS_Data/exports/earthquake_magnitude_surface.tif and save the QGIS project to /home/ga/GIS_Data/projects/earthquake_interpolation.qgz.
